violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -3 wet cloths sitting on counters.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Handles on scoops must be stored out of spices etc.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove foil from utility carts.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Use scoops with handles for spices...cannot use bowls.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Freezer in storage room is heavily iced and plastic frame is cracked. -2 door cooler in storage has rusty shelves.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean top shelf in 2 door cooler by ice machine. -Deep clean and bleach cutting boards on prep tables.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean filters and surround.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling need thorough cleaning.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back screen door does not seal tightly.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -2 kitchen employees observed doing glove changes without a handwash in between. 1 employee came from outside and put on gloves without handwash.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple wet cloths on prep areas.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove foil from on utility carts/racks.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Defrost 2 freezers in storage room and 1 in kitchen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all kitchen storage bins. -Clean all cutting boards.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean utility carts and all shelving in kitchen. -Clean plumbing pipes under dishwasher

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Clean dishwasher inside and out. -Dishwasher trays need deep cleaned or replaced.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Soap dispenser does not work.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Entire kitchen needs deep cleaning.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back screen door is not tight fitting.
